skills.name: NEO Anomaly Detection
skills.description: Ranks boot, service, disk, driver, update, and security anomalies from endpoint telemetry.

skills.name: Windows Error Fix
skills.description: Runs the conservative repair lane only after diagnostics justify it and the user confirms the action.

skills.name: NEO to RMM Telemetry
skills.description: Sends debug, verbose, health, audit, and anomaly context to RMM/OpenFang without exposing local secrets.

skills.name: NEO Capability Catalog
skills.description: Maps maintenance goals to safe capabilities with risk level, preflight, rollback, verification, telemetry, and official reference metadata.

skills.name: OpenFang Authorized Terminal
